packageRules.description: Group @inquirer packages together
Disable Chevrotain major updates while Node 20 is supported

Hold tsdown on 0.21.x while Node 20 is supported: tsdown 0.22+ sets engines node ^22.18.0 || >=24.0.0 (drops Node 20.19/20.20), but the repo still builds/tests on Node 20.20 with engine-strict, so 0.22+ aborts npm ci. Revisit when the Node 20 floor is dropped.

Group all @types packages together
Keep ModelAudit schema generator pins current

ModelAudit schema generator: only modelaudit (the top-level package) drives updates. Its transitive pins (pydantic, pydantic-core, and typing helpers) are a matched set that must move together — pydantic enforces an exact pydantic-core pair at import time, and pydantic-core releases ahead of pydantic stable — so an independent bump of any one creates an incompatible pair. They are refreshed by regenerating the schema when modelaudit bumps.
LLM provider packages: frequent updates with a ten-day stabilization window
All npm packages: wait 10 days, a buffer above the 7-day Socket minimum release age floor
@opencode-ai/sdk: weekly updates to reduce noise from daily releases
AWS SDK packages: weekly updates to reduce noise
Biome: weekly updates
Dev tooling: weekly updates (low urgency)
framer-motion: monthly updates (animation library, low urgency)
